assertions.text: Runs a status check against the 5 Phase 6 entry conditions (OpenHarness / local LLM model / self.md / v0 prototype / on-prem GPU).
Outputs a deferral notice because Phase 6 (27Y Q1+) is not yet reached, recommending simonK for current autonomous work.

cases.prompt: Activate the self.md personal agent in closed-network mode.

assertions.text: Verifies prerequisites and reports which of the 5 entry conditions are unmet.
Does not run as a production agent yet and defers with a checklist.
